---
title: "04 Enrichment analysis"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
cur <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(), error = function(e) NULL)
path <- if (is.null(cur)) NULL else if (is.character(cur)) cur else cur[["path"]]
if (!is.null(path) && length(path) > 0) {
  project_root <- normalizePath(file.path(dirname(path[1]), ".."), mustWork = FALSE)
} else {
  wd <- getwd()
  project_root <- if (dir.exists(file.path(wd, "Data"))) wd else normalizePath(file.path(wd, ".."), mustWork = FALSE)
}
if (requireNamespace("knitr", quietly = TRUE)) {
  knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = project_root)
  knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
}
options(width = 70)
```

# Setup

This script keeps only the **GSEA** part of downstream enrichment analysis.  
GSEA is performed on the full ranked gene list using **GO BP**,
**KEGG**, and **Hallmark** gene sets.

```{r paths}
if (!exists("project_root")) {
  cur <- tryCatch(knitr::current_input(), error = function(e) NULL)
  path <- if (is.null(cur)) NULL else if (is.character(cur)) cur else cur[["path"]]
  if (!is.null(path) && length(path) > 0) {
    project_root <- normalizePath(file.path(dirname(path[1]), ".."), mustWork = FALSE)
  } else {
    wd <- getwd()
    project_root <- if (dir.exists(file.path(wd, "Data"))) wd else normalizePath(file.path(wd, ".."), mustWork = FALSE)
  }
}
INPUT_DIR       <- file.path(project_root, "Results", "02_DEG")
RESULTS_DIR     <- file.path(project_root, "Results", "04_Enrichment")
TUMOR_VS_NORMAL <- file.path(INPUT_DIR, "Tumor_vs_normal.csv")
```

# Packages

```{r packages}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(enrichplot)
library(msigdbr)
```

# Read differential expression results

```{r read-results}
res <- read.csv(TUMOR_VS_NORMAL, row.names = 1)
stopifnot("logFC" %in% names(res), "adj.P.Val" %in% names(res))

res$gene_id <- sub("\\..*$", "", rownames(res))
message("Genes in ranked list input: ", nrow(res))
```

# Map ENSEMBL to ENTREZID

```{r id-map}
id_map <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = unique(res$gene_id),
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  columns = c("ENTREZID", "SYMBOL")
)

id_map <- id_map %>%
  filter(!is.na(ENTREZID)) %>%
  distinct(ENSEMBL, .keep_all = TRUE)
```

# Ranked gene list for GSEA

```{r gene-list}
rank_df <- res %>%
  left_join(id_map, by = c("gene_id" = "ENSEMBL")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ENTREZID)) %>%
  group_by(ENTREZID) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = abs(logFC), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

gene_list <- rank_df$logFC
names(gene_list) <- rank_df$ENTREZID
gene_list <- sort(gene_list, decreasing = TRUE)

head(gene_list)
```

# GO GSEA

```{r gsea-go}
gse_go <- gseGO(
  geneList = gene_list,
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  keyType = "ENTREZID",
  ont = "BP",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  minGSSize = 10,
  maxGSSize = 500,
  verbose = FALSE
)

gse_go_table <- as.data.frame(gse_go) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

gse_go_table %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```

# KEGG GSEA

```{r gsea-kegg}
gse_kegg <- gseKEGG(
  geneList = gene_list,
  organism = "hsa",
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  minGSSize = 10,
  maxGSSize = 500,
  verbose = FALSE
)

if (!is.null(gse_kegg) && nrow(as.data.frame(gse_kegg)) > 0) {
  gse_kegg <- setReadable(gse_kegg, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID")
}

gse_kegg_table <- as.data.frame(gse_kegg) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

gse_kegg_table %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```

# Hallmark GSEA

```{r gsea-hallmark}
hallmark_raw <- msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "H")
hallmark_raw$entrez_gene <- hallmark_raw$ncbi_gene

hallmark <- hallmark_raw %>%
  dplyr::select(gs_name, entrez_gene)

gsea_hallmark <- GSEA(
  geneList = gene_list,
  TERM2GENE = hallmark,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  minGSSize = 10,
  maxGSSize = 500,
  verbose = FALSE
)

gsea_hallmark_table <- as.data.frame(gsea_hallmark) %>%
  arrange(p.adjust)

gsea_hallmark_table %>% slice_head(n = 10)
```

# Plots

```{r plots}
dir.create(RESULTS_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

p_gse_go <- dotplot(gse_go, showCategory = 10) + ggtitle("GSEA GO BP")
print(p_gse_go)
ggsave(file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "GSEA_GO_dotplot.pdf"), p_gse_go, width = 9, height = 8)

top_id_go <- gse_go@result$ID[1]
top_title_go <- gse_go@result$Description[1]
p_go_one <- gseaplot2(gse_go, geneSetID = top_id_go, title = top_title_go)
print(p_go_one)
ggsave(file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "GSEA_GO_1.pdf"), p_go_one, width = 9, height = 6.5)

p_gse_kegg <- dotplot(gse_kegg, showCategory = 10) + ggtitle("GSEA KEGG")
print(p_gse_kegg)
ggsave(file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "GSEA_KEGG_dotplot.pdf"), p_gse_kegg, width = 9, height = 8)

top_id_kegg <- gse_kegg@result$ID[1]
top_title_kegg <- gse_kegg@result$Description[1]
p_kegg_one <- gseaplot2(gse_kegg, geneSetID = top_id_kegg, title = top_title_kegg)
print(p_kegg_one)
ggsave(file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "GSEA_KEGG_1.pdf"), p_kegg_one, width = 9, height = 6.5)

p_hallmark <- dotplot(gsea_hallmark, showCategory = 10) + ggtitle("GSEA Hallmark")
print(p_hallmark)
ggsave(file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "Hallmark_GSEA_dotplot.pdf"), p_hallmark, width = 9, height = 8)

top_id_hallmark <- gsea_hallmark@result$ID[1]
top_title_hallmark <- gsea_hallmark@result$Description[1]
p_hallmark_one <- gseaplot2(gsea_hallmark, geneSetID = top_id_hallmark, title = top_title_hallmark)
print(p_hallmark_one)
ggsave(file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "Hallmark_GSEA_1.pdf"), p_hallmark_one, width = 9, height = 6.5)
```

# Save tables

```{r save}
write.csv(gse_go_table %>% slice_head(n = 10), file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "GSEA_GO.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(gse_kegg_table %>% slice_head(n = 10), file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "GSEA_KEGG.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(gsea_hallmark_table %>% slice_head(n = 10), file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "Hallmark_GSEA.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

saveRDS(gse_go, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "gse_go.rds"))
saveRDS(gse_kegg, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "gse_kegg.rds"))
saveRDS(gsea_hallmark, file.path(RESULTS_DIR, "gsea_hallmark.rds"))
```
